UpdateL2Policy.action: Fixed value for this API: UpdateL2Policy
UpdateL2Policy.instanceId: Short instance ID of the PFS instance associated with the policyId
UpdateL2Policy.newPolicyName: New policy name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, colons (:), underscores (_), or hyphens (-); must begin with a letter or Chinese character; length: 1–128 characters (English or Chinese)
UpdateL2Policy.expiredTime: Expiration time of the policy in days; valid range: 1–365*5
UpdateL2Policy.executeTime: Execution time of the policy (hour of day); integer from 0 to 23; defaults to 0
UpdateL2Policy.bucketPrefix: Destination prefix for data archiving; must not start with "/" and must end with "/"
